# Community Sample: AI Customer Support QA

- 2026-06-10 Reddit smallbusiness: I stopped paying for the QA suite because it was too expensive for our small team, but manually checking support chats in a spreadsheet takes hours.

- 2026-06-09 Product Hunt review: Good product, but setup is too heavy when all I need is a weekly QA report. I would pay for a simple export.

- 2026-06-07 Founder forum: We manually copy support conversations into a sheet every Friday, and the training feedback is always late. A cheap report would save time.
